name: Automated hotel price drop alerts with email notifications and database tracking

nodes.name: Schedule - Every 6 Hours
nodes.notes: Triggers price check automatically every 6 hours to monitor rate changes

parameters.content:
## ⏰ TRIGGER
Runs price check every 6 hours automatically

nodes.name: Load Hotel List
nodes.notes: Loads list of hotels to monitor from database or configuration

parameters.content:
## 🏨 HOTEL LIST
Loads all hotels that need price monitoring

nodes.name: Fetch Current Price from API
nodes.notes: Retrieves real-time pricing data from hotel booking API

parameters.content:
## 💰 PRICE API
Fetches current room rates in real-time

nodes.name: Parse Price Data
nodes.notes: Extracts and formats current price information from API response

parameters.content:
## 📊 PARSE DATA
Extracts price and availability info

nodes.name: Get Previous Price from DB
nodes.notes: Retrieves last recorded price from database for comparison

parameters.content:
## 🗄️ DATABASE QUERY
Fetches previous price record

nodes.name: Compare Prices
nodes.notes: Calculates price difference and percentage change from previous check

parameters.content:
## 🔍 PRICE COMPARISON
Calculates difference and change %

nodes.name: Check if Price Reduced
nodes.notes: Filters only hotels where price has decreased to send alerts

parameters.content:
## ✅ PRICE FILTER
Identifies reduced prices only

nodes.name: Format Alert Email
nodes.notes: Creates formatted HTML email with price comparison and booking details

parameters.content:
## 📧 EMAIL FORMATTING
Creates beautiful HTML alert email

nodes.notes: Sends price drop alert email to travel agent with all details

parameters.content:
## 📮 EMAIL DELIVERY
Sends alert to travel agent

nodes.name: Log Alert Sent
nodes.notes: Records alert delivery for tracking and audit purposes

parameters.content:
## 📝 ALERT LOGGING
Records successful alert delivery

nodes.name: Log No Alert Needed
nodes.notes: Records check where no alert was needed (price unchanged or increased)

parameters.content:
## 📋 NO ALERT LOG
Records when prices didn't decrease

nodes.name: Merge All Logs
nodes.notes: Combines logs from both alert and no-alert paths

parameters.content:
## 🔀 LOG MERGE
Combines all check results

nodes.name: Update Price in Database
nodes.notes: Updates database with latest price for future comparisons

parameters.content:
## 💾 DATABASE UPDATE
Stores new price for next comparison

nodes.name: Create Execution Summary
nodes.notes: Generates summary report of price check execution and alerts sent

parameters.content:
## 🏨 HOTEL ROOM PRICE CHECKER

**Automated Price Monitoring System**

**Features:**
✓ Checks prices every 6 hours
✓ Monitors multiple hotels
✓ Detects price reductions
✓ Sends instant email alerts
✓ Shows old vs new prices
✓ Calculates savings amount
✓ Tracks price history
✓ Beautiful HTML emails

**Alert Triggers:**
• Price decreased
• Percentage savings
• Availability changes

**Email Includes:**
• Hotel name & location
• Room type details
• Old price (strikethrough)
• New price (highlighted)
• Savings amount & %
• Direct booking link
• Urgency indicator

**Setup Required:**
1. Configure schedule trigger
2. Add hotel API credentials
3. Setup database endpoint
4. Configure SMTP for emails
5. Update agent email address
6. Customize hotel list
7. Test price comparison logic
